HomeAbout

About Us

About Us

E Royal Mango was born in the heart of Multan's legendary mango belt — where generations of growers have perfected the art of cultivating the world's finest mangoes.

Our Story Our Story

E Royal Mango was born in the heart of Multan's legendary mango belt — where generations of growers have perfected the art of cultivating the world's finest mangoes.

We partner directly with trusted orchard owners to hand-select every fruit at peak ripeness, ensuring export-grade quality from tree to table.

We work through every aspect at the planning

We do it for you with love

  • Export Process

    Hand-picked at peak ripeness • Graded for export quality • Foam-lined protective packaging • Temperature-controlled logistics

  • Packaging Process

    Individual foam netting • Ventilated export cartons • Gift box options available • Custom corporate branding

Orchard Direct

Sourced directly from Multan and Sindh orchards with no middlemen.

Export Quality

Every mango graded and packed to international export standards.

Nationwide Delivery

Fast, temperature-aware shipping across Pakistan and abroad.

Royal Presentation

Luxury gift boxes and crates for personal and corporate orders.

E Royal Mango delivers Pakistan's finest export-quality mangoes — handpicked from Multan's legendary orchards with royal care.
